lemon_market_new_listings.description: The vehicle is in good condition. It shows minor signs of wear on the interior and exterior. All major systems are functional and the vehicle is well-maintained.
This vehicle is in poor condition. The interior and exterior show significant damage and wear. Mechanical systems are currently failing and require substantial repairs to be operational.

This vehicle is in fair condition and serves as a dependable daily driver, though it clearly shows its age through visible wear and tear. The exterior features several noticeable scratches and a few small dings scattered across the body panels. Inside, the upholstery is intact but shows significant wear and some fading from sun exposure. Mechanically, the car is sound and drives well, but it may require routine maintenance soon as the brakes are beginning to squeak. Overall, it is a functional and honest vehicle for someone looking for reliable transportation without the premium price of a newer model.

This vehicle is in poor condition and will require substantial mechanical and cosmetic work to be roadworthy. The engine has a significant oil leak and struggles to idle, while the transmission shifts roughly. Cosmetically, there is widespread rust on the rocker panels, significant paint failure across most surfaces, and multiple body dents. The interior shows heavy wear, including torn seating and a cracked dashboard. It is being sold as-is, ideally for a dedicated restoration project or as a parts donor.

Check out this fantastic find! This vehicle is in good condition and has been reliably maintained, showing only light signs of use consistent with its age. It’s a solid, dependable ride that’s ready for many more miles of adventure!
Good condition.

This vehicle represents an exceptional opportunity for the discerning buyer, offering a sophisticated balance of performance and long-term reliability. Meticulously maintained and presenting in commendable condition, it features a clean aesthetic and robust mechanical systems throughout. This is a high-value acquisition that delivers a premium driving experience while maintaining a disciplined price point.

Hey friends! I'm super excited to find a new home for my car! It’s been a total rockstar for me and it’s still in wonderful shape. It runs smoothly and has been well-loved, making it the perfect reliable companion for your daily commutes or weekend getaways. I'm sad to see it go, but I know the next owner is going to love it just as much as I have! Let's get you behind the wheel!

This E46 M3 is powered by the high-revving S54 3.2L inline-six, featuring six individual throttle bodies and a high-pressure Double-VANOS system for optimized torque across the RPM range. The power is managed via a Getrag 6-speed manual gearbox and sent to the rear wheels through a variable M differential lock. Significant mechanical upkeep includes a reinforced rear subframe and a recent valve adjustment to ensure peak volumetric efficiency. The suspension geometry remains tight, utilizing a MacPherson strut front and multi-link rear setup that provides exceptional lateral grip. A mechanically sound driver's car for those who prioritize analog
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minimal wear. Serious buyers only.

This 2018 Lexus RX 350 has been meticulously maintained and serves as a reliable, luxurious daily driver. The exterior features a brilliant pearl finish that shines beautifully, with only minor road wear consistent with careful use visible upon close inspection. Inside, the parchment leather interior remains supple and clean, free from any odors, tears, or significant staining. All onboard electronics, including the navigation system, heated seats, and premium audio, are fully operational. Mechanically, the vehicle is in great shape; it comes with a documented service history, recently passed a multi-point inspection, and sits on a set of high-quality tires with deep tread remaining. This is a well-cared-for vehicle that offers a smooth, quiet ride and comes with a clean title and two

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that balances robust performance with sophisticated design. This unit has undergone a comprehensive multi-point inspection to ensure mechanical integrity and road-ready reliability. Featuring a clean aesthetic and a well-appointed interior, it represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking quality at a competitive price point. Experience the confidence of a vehicle that delivers both longevity and prestige.

This vehicle represents a sophisticated balance of performance and dependability. Meticulously maintained to ensure a refined driving experience, it offers the discerning buyer an exceptional value proposition. With a focus on structural integrity and mechanical reliability, this unit stands as a testament to quality craftsmanship and consistent care.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolutely wonderful to own. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for me—perfect for anyone looking for a dependable daily driver that still looks great on the road. I’ve taken good care of it, and it's ready to hit the pavement with a new owner today! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin!

Available is a well-sorted E46 M3 featuring the legendary S54 naturally aspirated inline-six powerplant. This unit retains its mechanical purity with a crisp 6-speed manual gearbox and a factory-spec limited-slip differential. Recent preventative maintenance includes a comprehensive VANOS overhaul and reinforced rear subframe mounting points to ensure chassis rigidity under high lateral loads. The high-revving valvetrain remains tight, delivering linear power delivery up to the 8,000 RPM redline. Suspension geometry is dialed for spirited driving, maintaining excellent damping characteristics and precise turn-in. A driver-focused example with a clean title, ready for the apex.
Used car in good condition. Reliable engine. Clean title. Minor cosmetic wear. Regular maintenance completed.

Offering a meticulously maintained 2018 Luxury SUV that balances performance with everyday utility. The exterior features a deep metallic finish that still catches the light beautifully, though a close inspection reveals a few minor stone chips on the front bumper consistent with careful highway driving. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary of premium leather and polished wood accents; the seats remain supportive and clean, with only slight softening of the driver’s side bolster. All technological features, including the premium sound system and navigation, are fully functional. Mechanically, this vehicle is sound, having undergone regular synthetic oil changes and a recent full brake inspection. The tires offer plenty of tread for the seasons ahead, and the engine runs whisper-quiet. This is a reliable, smoke-free vehicle that has been garage-kept and is ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

Presenting a meticulously maintained vehicle that exemplifies dependable performance and a sophisticated aesthetic. This unit has undergone a rigorous inspection process to ensure it meets our exacting standards for mechanical integrity and driver comfort. Offering a premier balance of value and longevity, this vehicle stands as a testament to conscientious ownership and is prepared for immediate delivery to a discerning buyer.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a well-preserved aesthetic, it offers a balanced combination of performance and value. Fully inspected and prepared for immediate delivery, this unit stands as a testament to responsible ownership and enduring quality.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty ride, and she’s been absolutely wonderful to me. It’s in really solid shape and has been super reliable for all my daily commutes and fun weekend trips. I’ve taken great care of it, so it’s clean, runs smoothly, and is totally ready for its next adventure with a new owner. You’re going to love how it drives! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions—I'd love to see it go to a great home!

This E92 M3 is a purist’s specification, featuring the high-revving S65 naturally aspirated V8 paired with a tactile 6-speed longitudinal manual transmission. The engine exhibits crisp throttle response via its eight individual throttle bodies, with the rod bearing service recently completed as preventative maintenance. The chassis remains taut, benefitting from Electronic Damper Control (EDC) and the mechanical grip provided by the Variable M Differential Lock. While showing minor cosmetic patina consistent with its age, the mechanical integrity is robust, with consistent oil analysis reports and a healthy VANOS system. It sits on staggered Style 220M
Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. Mechanically sound. Title in hand.

This vehicle represents a fantastic balance of performance and daily usability, maintained with a focus on longevity and aesthetic appeal. It's in really nice shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone looking for a dependable vehicle that still looks and feels great on the road. I've taken good care of it, so it's ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or want to come see it!

Used car. Good condition. Clean title. Routine maintenance performed. Reliable daily driver.

This meticulously maintained luxury SUV strikes the perfect balance between performance and daily utility. The exterior retains a deep, mirror-like gloss, showing only the minor stone chips on the front bumper expected from careful highway use. Inside, the cabin is a sanctuary; the premium leather seats are supple with very light creasing on the driver's bolster, and the genuine wood trim is free of cracks. Every feature, from the panoramic sunroof to the heated steering wheel and dual-zone climate control, operates exactly as intended. Mechanically, this vehicle is robust, having followed a strict preventative maintenance schedule. It recently received a fresh oil service, new cabin air filters, and the tires have significant tread remaining. It drives straight and true, with smooth shifts and a quiet cabin environment. This is a smoke-free, pet-free vehicle that comes with a complete set of service records and two original fobs. It represents a fantastic opportunity for a buyer seeking a reliable, high-end vehicle that has been treated with genuine care.

This meticulously maintained vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer. Demonstrating a consistent history of professional servicing, the automobile remains in commendable mechanical and aesthetic order. It offers a sophisticated driving experience, balancing enduring performance with refined interior appointments. This selection exemplifies our commitment to quality and serves as a testament to conscientious ownership.
